meta.intent: Teach valid group taps, dock clears, rescue extraction, and that water is now part of every real board.
meta.expectedPath: Clear the lower-center A and B route pairs to open the lane around the puppy, then take the top A pair to finish the rescue before the second rise matters.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player chases the easy side triples first, stuffs the dock with mismatched pieces, and walks into Dock Jam instead of finishing the rescue lane.
meta.whatItProves: The game can deliver 'save the puppy' before it reads as abstract clearing.
meta.notes: The rebuilt first rescue keeps the direct center lane readable, but breaks several side triples into residue-producing pairs and slightly reduces spawn assistance so generic clearing creates visible dock pressure before the rescue lane is finished.
